# Twig JSX

> JSX-like component syntax for Twig. Transforms `<Alert {type} important />` into native Twig `{% include %}`/`{% embed %}` calls at the lexer level. Zero dependencies, no runtime overhead.

## Not Supported

This library is a shortcut for the common case — props in, single content block out. The following are explicit non-goals; use plain Twig instead:

- **Multi-slot / named slots**: use `{% embed %}` with multiple `{% block %}` overrides
- **PHP-side component classes**: use Symfony UX TwigComponent
- **Component lifecycle, reactive state, or runtime behavior**: this is a source rewriter with no runtime
- **Two-way binding or event handlers**: there is no client-side layer

## Call-site Syntax

All four forms compile into a single `props` bag inside the component template.

```twig
<Alert type="info" />           {# static string #}
<Alert type={userType} />       {# Twig expression #}
<Alert {type} />                {# shorthand — equivalent to type={type} #}
<Alert important />             {# bare boolean — equivalent to important={true} #}
```

Old `:foo="expr"` syntax is rejected with a `SyntaxError`.

## Component-side Contract

Every prop arrives in a single `ComponentAttributes` bag named `props` by default.

```twig
{# Destructure semantic inputs #}
{% set type    = props.type|default('info') %}
{% set message = props.message|default('') %}

{# Spread remaining keys as HTML attributes #}
<div class="alert-{{ type }}" {{ props.except('type', 'message')|render }}>
    {% block content %}{{ message }}{% endblock %}
</div>
```

- `props.key` — read any value
- `props.except('a', 'b')` — new bag without listed keys; for HTML fallthrough
- `{{ props|render }}` — renders all entries as `key="value"` attribute pairs

Bodied tags render children into a Twig block:

```twig
<Alert type="warning">Some <strong>content</strong></Alert>
{# compiles to: {% embed ... %}{% block content %}Some <strong>content</strong>{% endblock %}{% endembed %} #}
```

## Setup

```php
use Lemmon\TwigJsx\JSXPreLexer;
use Lemmon\TwigJsx\AttributeExtension;

$twig = new \Twig\Environment($loader);
$twig->addExtension(new AttributeExtension());
$twig->setLexer(new JSXPreLexer($twig));
```

## Configuration

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `directory` | `components` | Subdirectory inside `templates/` where component files are looked up |
| `extension` | `.twig` | File extension for component templates |
| `prefix` | `""` | Tag prefix; when empty, any Capitalized tag is treated as a component |
| `props_variable` | `props` | Variable name for the props bag inside the component template |
| `content_block` | `content` | Twig block name where bodied tag children are rendered |

Pass options as the second argument: `new JSXPreLexer($twig, ['props_variable' => 'inputs'])`.
